published_prior_art.cite: none; routine 2x2 odds-ratio algebra, explicitly not the flagship claim

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded_v1 and pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 are adjacent budget/compatibility proposals, not Lee always-selected alpha-profile bounds

published_prior_art.cite: Lee2009SampleSelection gives monotone trimming; ShepherdGilbertJemiaiRotnitzky2006/JemiaiRotnitzkyShepherdGilbert2007/ShepherdRedmanAnkerst2008/ShepherdGilbertDupont2011 give principal-stratum beta/psi sensitivity, but not the coupled alpha,kappa sharp support function

repo_prior_art.cite: ManskiNonparametricBounds_Study has bounded-outcome algebra, not finite-Gamma equality-case classification for principal selection

published_prior_art.cite: Manski1990NonparametricBounds/HorowitzManski1995Censoring and SmithVanderWeele2019Selection/ZetterstromSjolanderWaernbaum2025Selection do not characterize Lee-style alpha-coupled finite-Gamma strict tightening/equality cases

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a short nonblocking comparator sentence for Ding-Lu-style principal-score sensitivity or Long-Hudgens-style principal-effect bounds to show the survey also covers the broader SACE sensitivity literature.
Turn the displayed numerical witness into a symbolic open-cell certificate by giving inequalities under which the same active odds-ratio faces and alpha optimizer remain stable.
State the active-set endpoint algorithm explicitly: enumerate Frechet/OR faces, solve the quadratic-radical stationary equations over alpha, and return the support-function endpoints.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 derivation with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and Theorem 1 as a calibration lemma.
